last_round_summary: R8: added flood-relevance gate (advisor-caught blind spot). Roof was mostly wind/hail (out of inland-flood scope) -> removed from bundle (app falls back to built-in), flagged for human authoring. content-bundle now 5 records, 49/49 verified through 3 gates. Wrap-up green.
